subject: task
body:
WATCHDOG: you are online but not marked working.
START NOW: Jack holster+climb #72
https://github.com/yonidavidson/quarry/issues/72
1) agentcomm --as yonidavidson-0f43 register --status "working #72 …"
2) agentcomm send yonidavidson-0f43 --subject ack "taking #72"
3) ship; send done + screenshots
Idle next tick = reassignment.
